introSection: Wild Thing is a steel hyper roller coaster located at Valleyfair in Shakopee, Minnesota, USA. It was the first coaster built by Morgan, opening on May 11, 1996. The ride's success led to the opening of Steel Force at Dorney Park in Allentown, Pennsylvania the following year and Mamba at Worlds of Fun in Kansas City, Missouri in 1998.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has an out and back layout with a large turnaround.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Light green track and dark green supports.

sections.title: Incident
sections.content: Eighteen riders were injured on Sunday, May 21, 2006 when the final car separated from the rest of the train and came to a halt partially tipped over. The subsequent investigation was unable to determine the cause of the incident, and Wild Thing reopened on June 1.

fullText:
Wild Thing is a steel hyper roller coaster located at Valleyfair in Shakopee, Minnesota, USA. It was the first coaster built by Morgan, opening on May 11, 1996. The ride's success led to the opening of Steel Force at Dorney Park in Allentown, Pennsylvania the following year and Mamba at Worlds of Fun in Kansas City, Missouri in 1998.

Wild Thing opened on May 11, 1996.

The ride has an out and back layout with a large turnaround.

Light green track and dark green supports.



Eighteen riders were injured on Sunday, May 21, 2006 when the final car separated from the rest of the train and came to a halt partially tipped over. The subsequent investigation was unable to determine the cause of the incident, and Wild Thing reopened on June 1.
